data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): User directive — 'Fixes recommended by bot-psychologist are approved' for all Category D intent-confirmed clusters. Cluster F fix approved: harden ticket-create.sh exit code from warning (exit 0) to hard failure (exit 1) when required headers missing. Note: this affects CLI behavior for ALL ticket create bug callers — consider backward-compat during application (may need brief grace period with warning-only for existing callers). Agent-level CLAUDE.md rule is the secondary fallback.
